entities.name: SESSION_STATE
entities.context: State tracking mechanism passed automatically during context handoff

entities.name: Worker
entities.context: Execution unit that receives handoff context including mission, criteria, dependencies, and deliverables

entities.name: Context Handoff
entities.context: Automatic process for passing state, artifacts, objectives, and file references between components

entities.name: Dependencies
entities.context: What a worker needs from its parent to execute

entities.name: Deliverables
entities.context: What parent expects back from worker upon completion

entities.name: Success Criteria
entities.context: Clear standards defining when worker mission is complete

entities.name: Mission Statement
entities.context: Clear directive provided to worker defining its task

relationships.context: SESSION_STATE is automatically included in context handoff
Worker receives success criteria to guide execution
Worker receives mission statement defining its task
Context handoff provides worker with necessary context
